commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ad87a5a128c949003216c68affe0ce27b2baeaa9)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes unconfigured thread-scoped sessions to use idle/no-expiry reset by default, updates session docs and regression tests, and removes one plugin host lint suppression.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +44, Docs +7. Total +53 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main defaults unresolved reset policies to daily and initSessionState applies that policy after classifying thread sessions. I did not run local tests because this review is read-only, but the PR body and Mantis artifacts provide after-fix runtime proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer product and upgrade approval for a released default change, not a mechanical repair ClawSweeper should choose automatically.
